case_title: ALISON VAN NOLAND VS. CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE FOR SERVICE:$0.00 N/A) SERVED NOV-25-2014, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO
